final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover) for a pearl milk tea product, girly pink aesthetic with a summer refreshing vibe.

Style/medium: pastel editorial product photography, soft dreamy illustration-meets-photo style, inspired by Japanese kawaii food styling
Composition: vertical portrait frame, centered subject with generous negative space, slight top-down tilt to show drink details
Subject: pearl milk tea in a clear cup with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on the cup surface, pastel pink straw, whipped cream or foam top
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background with scattered light floral or star confetti props, subtle summer elements (ice cubes, flower petals)
Lighting/mood: bright airy diffused light from upper left, high-key soft shadows, cheerful and refreshing summer mood
Color palette: blush pink and creamy white as base, warm milk-tea brown as anchor, translucent pearl accents
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on cup surface, glossy tapioca pearls, soft foam texture on top
Avoid: dark moody tones, harsh shadows, cluttered background, generic stock-photo flatness, neon colors
